# Doshok — Premium Women's Fashion in Bangladesh

> Style That Speaks. Premium women's fashion ecommerce store based in Bangladesh.

## About
Doshok is a Bangladesh-based women's fashion ecommerce store specializing in women's clothing, three-piece sets, and salwar kameez style collections. We offer curated dresses, tops, and occasion wear for the modern wardrobe with cash-on-delivery (COD) and nationwide delivery across Bangladesh.

## Key URLs
- [Homepage](https://doshok.com)
- [Products](https://doshok.com/products)
- [Contact](https://doshok.com/contact)
- [Track Order](https://doshok.com/track-order)
- [FAQ](https://doshok.com/faq)
- [Policy](https://doshok.com/policy)
- [New Arrivals](https://doshok.com/new-arrivals)
- [About](https://doshok.com/about)
- [Size Guide](https://doshok.com/size-guide)
- [Return Policy](https://doshok.com/returns)
- [Delivery](https://doshok.com/delivery)
- [Terms & Conditions](https://doshok.com/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](https://doshok.com/privacy)
- [Cart](https://doshok.com/cart)
- [Search](https://doshok.com/search)

## Features
- Browse products by category
- Product search with filtering
- Shopping cart and checkout
- Order tracking
- Cash on delivery (COD)
- Nationwide delivery in Bangladesh
- Customer support via contact form
- Account registration and login
- Product reviews and ratings
- Size guides and care instructions
